notes: Broad, auditable source registry. Official sources are preferred. Aggregators are discovery-only and must be verified before application.

programs.title: Federal Student Work Experience Program (FSWEP)
programs.description: Year-round federal student inventory plus specialized departmental inventories. Roles can span administration, finance, policy, communications, research, operations, and other fields.

programs.title: Research Affiliate Program
programs.source_name: Government of Canada — Research Affiliate Program
programs.description: Part-time federal research work while pursuing studies. Research must relate to the student’s degree or program.

programs.title: Post-Secondary Co-op/Internship Program
programs.description: Federal co-op and internship placements advertised through validated academic programs and school coordinators.

programs.title: Government of Canada Youth and Student Employment Hub
programs.source_name: Government of Canada — Youth and Student Employment
programs.description: Official index covering FSWEP, specialized federal programs, co-op, Parks Canada, research jobs, Job Bank youth roles, and other student pathways.

programs.title: Student Border Services Officer — Summer 2027
programs.description: Paid student border-services employment involving public service, legislation, operational judgment, client interaction, and enforcement-related responsibilities.

programs.title: Parks Canada Student and Youth Employment
programs.description: Student and youth opportunities across Parks Canada, including visitor services, administration, communications, finance, operations, and program support where available.

programs.title: CRA Student and Graduate Hiring
programs.description: Official CRA pathway for student and graduate opportunities in taxation, audit, finance, administration, data, policy, service, and related functions.

programs.title: NRC Student Employment Program
programs.description: Career-related student work across research and development plus communications, marketing, library sciences, administration, and other support areas.

programs.title: CFIA Student Opportunities
programs.description: Student assignments through direct institutional hiring and federal student programs, including regulatory, policy, program, administrative, science, and operational work.

programs.title: Student Work Placement Program
programs.source_name: Government of Canada — Student Work Placement Program
programs.description: Government-supported work-integrated learning placements delivered through partner organizations and employers across Canadian industries.

programs.title: Bank of Canada Students and Recent Graduates
programs.description: Official student and recent-graduate recruiting pathway for economics, finance, business, data, communications, administration, policy, and related work.

programs.title: House of Commons Student Employment Program
programs.description: Paid student employment and co-op placements in the House of Commons, with winter, summer and fall work terms across operational and administrative fields.
programs.season: Winter, summer and fall work terms

programs.title: Parliamentary Guide Program — Fall-Winter 2026–2027
programs.description: Paid bilingual student work delivering tours and interpreting Parliament’s work, history and architecture for visitors while supporting a professional public-service environment.
programs.interest: it places bilingual communication, public education, parliamentary procedure and public service at the centre of a paid student role.
programs.category: student bilingual parliamentary public affairs communications law policy visitor services
fit_reasons: BCom/JD interest in Parliament and public policy
programs.eligibility_notes: The official program requires Canadian citizenship or permanent residence, study at a Canadian university, and bilingual English/French ability. Confirm fall-winter availability and all application documents before the July 23, 2026 deadline.
programs.work_auth: Canadian citizen or permanent resident required
programs.warning: Confirm citizenship or permanent-resident status and the program’s fall-winter work schedule.

programs.title: Senate of Canada Student Employment Program
programs.description: Year-round student employment across Senate Administration functions such as chamber and committee operations, finance and procurement, communications, human resources and other public-service teams.
programs.interest: it offers direct exposure to parliamentary administration and lets students contribute across policy-adjacent, financial, operational and communications functions.
programs.category: student parliament policy finance procurement communications human resources public service
fit_reasons: RBC client service and regulated-environment experience
programs.eligibility_notes: Confirm current enrolment, return-to-studies expectations, Canadian work authorization, term availability and any team-specific security or language requirements.
programs.work_auth: Canadian work authorization and Senate requirements apply
programs.class_year: High school, CEGEP, college or university student
programs.warning: This is a year-round student inventory; openings and team requirements vary.

programs.title: Legal Excellence Program — Law Student and Articling Recruitment
programs.description: Office-specific law-student, summer and articling recruitment offering exposure to government litigation, legal advisory work, legislation, policy and public-law practice.
programs.interest: it combines legal research, litigation and advisory work with the policy and institutional responsibilities of the federal government.
programs.category: law student summer articling legal litigation advisory legislation policy government
programs.eligibility_notes: Justice Canada offices recruit on different schedules and many summer or articling streams target students who have reached a specified stage of law school. Monitor office pages as your JD progression aligns.
programs.class_year: Typically upper-year law student or articling candidate
programs.warning: Treat this as a future-cycle networking and application target until the office-specific academic-year requirement is met.

programs.title: BC Public Service Co-op Employment Program
programs.description: Co-op placements for post-secondary students enrolled in recognized co-operative education programs, including students at accredited institutions outside British Columbia.

programs.title: BC Public Service Student Employment Program
programs.description: Student employment opportunities across the BC Public Service intended to provide practical experience and exposure to public-sector careers.

programs.title: Alberta Public Service Student Opportunities and Internships
programs.description: Current-student, co-op and internship opportunities across the Alberta Public Service; individual vacancies are linked through the official provincial jobs board.

programs.title: Quebec Public Service Student Jobs and Internships
programs.description: Student jobs and internship opportunities across Quebec government ministries and public bodies, with vacancies posted through the official online recruitment service.

programs.title: Inshore Rescue Boat Student Program — Summer 2027
programs.description: Paid full-time summer student work on an Inshore Rescue Boat crew, including search-and-rescue training, public boating-safety education, emergency response, communications and teamwork.
programs.category: student summer public service emergency operations communications leadership
programs.eligibility_label: Check licences, certifications and regional requirements
programs.eligibility_notes: Confirm full-time and return-to-studies status, regional language requirements, driver’s licence and marine/first-aid certifications, security screening, medical clearance, and full-time Summer 2027 availability.
programs.work_auth: Federal student and security requirements apply
programs.warning: The program has licence, certification, medical, security, regional-language and full-time availability requirements.
programs.interest: it combines public service, safety-critical teamwork, clear communication and practical responsibility in a demanding summer environment.
fit_reasons: Calm judgment in a regulated environment
Interest in public service and operational responsibility

programs.title: Pathways Internship Program
programs.description: Federal internship pathway for current students across agencies and occupational fields. Individual openings are retrieved through USAJOBS when credentials are configured.

programs.title: Volunteer Legal Internships
programs.source_name: U.S. Department of Justice Legal Careers
programs.description: Legal internship pathway across Department of Justice offices. Individual postings can have law-school, citizenship, background-investigation, and term-specific requirements.

programs.title: Bureau of Competition Legal Internships
programs.location: Washington, DC and other U.S. locations
programs.description: Legal internship information for the FTC’s Bureau of Competition, with antitrust, investigation, litigation, and policy exposure subject to formal eligibility requirements.

programs.title: Student Internship Program
programs.description: Federal student internships supporting diplomacy, policy, administration, finance, public affairs, research, operations, and other functions, subject to U.S. citizenship and security requirements.

not_scraped.reason: Used only for human discovery/verification; this project does not bypass anti-bot controls or scrape pages contrary to site terms.
Not scraped because the public terms prohibit automated scraping. Municipal and state roles should be added through an authorized API or employer-specific official feed.
